sections.content: Board still didn't change. Clicking small red squares does nothing. Let me try clicking on the larger blue/red squares. Let me try clicking on a large blue square in the bottom-right grid.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Try clicking on a large blue square in the bottom-right grid
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 36:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        if min_r >= 36:
            action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': min_r, 'col': min_c}])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game-tier fields: initial state, no prior knowledge yet", "level-tier fields: initial state, no prior knowledge yet"}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
